title: ruppia maritima subsp. intermedia
intro: Ruppia maritima subsp. intermedia, also known as intermediate sea blite or saltwort, is a type of halophytic plant that belongs to the family Potamogetonaceae. It has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional medicine, to treat various health conditions. The plant is valued for its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties, which can help alleviate respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as reduce inflammation and promote wound healing. Ruppia maritima subsp. intermedia can be prepared into herbal remedies, including teas, infusions, and salves, and is also used in traditional folk medicine to treat various other health conditions.
